summaryAm: ትንሽ ምግቡን ይዞ የሚሄድ ውሻ በውኃ ውስጥ ያየውን ጥላ ሲመኝ የሚማርበት ቀላል ታሪክ።
moralAm: ያለንን ማወቅ፣ ማመስገን እና በቂ ማለት ጥሩ ነው።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: አንድ ደስተኛ ውሻ ከመንደሩ ትንሽ ጣፋጭ ቁራሽ አገኘ። በጥንቃቄ በአፉ ይዞ ወደ ቤቱ መጓዝ ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: A happy dog found a small tasty treat and carried it home.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly dog carries a small treat along a sunny village path.

pages.textAm: መንገዱ በትንሽ ወንዝ አጠገብ ያልፍ ነበር። ውኃው ጸጥ ብሎ ይብራ ነበር፣ እንደ መስታወትም ያንጸባርቅ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The path passed beside a calm stream that shone like a mirror.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog reaches a calm stream with clear mirror-like water.

pages.textAm: ውሻው ወደ ውኃው ሲመለከት ሌላ ውሻ ቁራሽ ይዞ እንደቆመ መሰለው። እርግጥ ግን የራሱ ጥላ ነበር።
pages.textEn: He saw what looked like another dog, but it was only his reflection.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog sees his own reflection holding a treat in the peaceful water.

pages.textAm: “ያ ቁራሽ ከእኔ ይበልጣል ይመስላል” ብሎ አሰበ። “ሁለቱንም ካገኘሁ በጣም ደስ ይለኛል!”
pages.textEn: He thought the reflected treat looked bigger and wanted both.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog looks curious and tempted while staring at the reflection.

pages.textAm: ውሻው አፉን ከፍቶ ወደ ጥላው ሊጠራ ሞከረ። በዚያን ጊዜ የያዘው ቁራሽ ከአፉ ወደ ውኃው ወደቀ።
pages.textEn: When he opened his mouth, his own treat fell into the water.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The small treat drops gently into the stream as the dog looks surprised.

pages.textAm: ውሻው ትንሽ ቆሞ ውኃውን ተመለከተ። ጥላውም ቁራሹም ጠፉ። “ያለኝን አላመሰገንኩም” ብሎ በጸጥታ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: The dog paused and understood that he had not been grateful for what he had.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog sits quietly beside the stream, learning a gentle lesson.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ውሻው ትንሽ ነገር ሲያገኝ እንኳን በደስታ ይቀበል ነበር። ያለውን ማመስገን ተማረ።
pages.textEn: After that day, the dog learned to be thankful for what he had.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog walks home peacefully through warm afternoon light.
